reviews.text: Been trying to buy the same single issue for 2 months now. Website keeps advertising this issue as in stock and ready to ship. I go to checkout and get that locely message again: error no longer in stock. Fix your website.

reviews.author: Esther Shaw
reviews.text: It was very disappointed with this company. After my charge account had been charged. I waited three weeks to inquire when the magazine I had ordered would be sent. First they told me their system showed my order was a fraud. I informed them they had already received money For my order and wanted to know when the first issue would be sent. After checking, they then came back and said they would send it right away in the magazine should arrive by the end of the week. I waited a full week called again to inquire if they had in fact sent it. They checked the order then came back and said they would send an email to me. I received the email and they said they had canceled the order and I would be refunded. This after receiving my money for a month. No one reached out to me and I would never have known how I not Inquired.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat kecewa dengan perusahaan ini. Setelah rekening saya ditagih, saya menunggu tiga minggu untuk menanyakan kapan majalah yang saya pesan akan dikirim. Pertama, mereka mengatakan sistem mereka menunjukkan pesanan saya adalah penipuan. Saya memberi tahu mereka bahwa mereka telah menerima uang untuk pesanan saya dan ingin tahu kapan edisi pertama akan dikirim. Setelah diperiksa, mereka kemudian mengatakan akan segera mengirimkannya dan majalah tersebut akan tiba pada akhir minggu. Saya menunggu selama seminggu penuh, menelepon lagi untuk menanyakan apakah mereka benar-benar telah mengirimkannya. Mereka memeriksa pesanan, kemudian mengatakan akan mengirim email kepada saya. Saya menerima email tersebut dan mereka mengatakan telah membatalkan pesanan dan saya akan mendapatkan pengembalian dana. Ini terjadi setelah saya menerima uang saya selama sebulan. Tidak ada yang menghubungi saya dan saya tidak akan pernah tahu mengapa saya tidak menanyakannya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re sorry to hear about your experience and understand how frustrating that must have been. Occasionally our system flags orders for security reasons, but we always aim to resolve these cases quickly. Please reach out to our support team with your order details so we can review this and help make things right.

reviews.text: This place is a MUST for anyone who loves magazines. The selection is amazing – from popular titles to hard-to-find niche publications. Ini adalah tempat yang santai di mana Anda dapat dengan mudah menghabiskan waktu untuk melihat-lihat dan menemukan majalah-majalah baru. Sangat layak dikunjungi jika Anda berada di daerah tersebut!

reviews.text: My experience with Magazine Cafe was excellent! I contacted customer service to find out when I could expect to receive my order. Much to my surprise, the magazine was delivered in today’s mail, securely wrapped and sealed, and in excellent condition. I’m completely satisfied with this first time experience with this company, and highly recommend them to everyone!

Mereka langsung membalas, memberi tahu saya bahwa pesanan saya sedang dalam perjalanan dan diperkirakan akan tiba dalam 3-5 hari. Mereka sangat baik, membantu, dan sopan. reviews.text: I AM 1 Happy Customers With Magazine Cafe.1St Time Order From Them Thru EBAY.They PUT The Magazines In 1 Plastic Bag And Put 1 HOLE PIECE OF CARDBOARD IN  A 2nd Plastic Bag.Double BAGS It And It A Live In Great Sharp.GREAT CUSTOMERS SERVICE.NOW A DAY IT HARD TWO FINE GOOD CUSTOMERS SERVICE.I GIVE THEM 10 STARS+.UALLS BE HAPPY WITH MAGAZINE CAFE IN NEW YORK,NY.

reviews.author: C. Lum
reviews.text:
They are convenient if you don't live where foreign magazines are sold.  However, do be aware that for a while now they have decided to charge from $1 to $2 more than what the publisher has pasted or printed on the magazines as to the magazine's cost.  This is not just for foreign magazines but also for domestic magazines.  I know that US consumer law basically states that the price that's shown on the item is the price that a store has to charge!  So this is, IMO, something this store is doing illegally.

They also offer 'rewards' points which are just discounts on one's order.  But nowadays every time I want use the points their website never loads them so I miss out.  This has happened each and every time nowadays that I think it's intentional.
reviews.textTranslated:
Memang praktis kalau Anda tidak tinggal di tempat yang menjual majalah asing. Namun, perlu diketahui bahwa untuk beberapa waktu ini, mereka memutuskan untuk mengenakan biaya $1 hingga $2 lebih mahal daripada yang ditempel atau dicetak penerbit di majalah. Ini tidak hanya berlaku untuk majalah asing, tetapi juga untuk majalah lokal. Saya tahu bahwa hukum konsumen AS pada dasarnya menyatakan bahwa harga yang tertera pada barang adalah harga yang harus dibebankan oleh toko! Jadi, menurut saya, ini adalah sesuatu yang dilakukan toko ini secara ilegal.

Mereka juga menawarkan poin 'hadiah' yang sebenarnya merupakan diskon untuk pesanan seseorang. Namun, sekarang ini, setiap kali saya ingin menggunakan poin tersebut, situs web mereka tidak pernah menampilkannya, jadi saya melewatkannya. Hal ini terjadi setiap kali akhir-akhir ini, dan saya pikir ini disengaja.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. Magazine pricing can sometimes vary due to import costs, distributor pricing, and shipping expenses, especially for international titles. We always try to keep pricing fair while continuing to offer a wide range of magazines.

Regarding the rewards points, we’re sorry to hear you had trouble using them. We have resolved this issue and now your points are applied correctly.

reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 star rating. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: bennic callaham
reviews.text: Has a lot of different types of magazines from Fashion to lifestyle also, they sell Pantone colors
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka memiliki banyak sekali jenis majalah, mulai dari majalah mode hingga gaya hidup, dan mereka juga menjual warna Pantone.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the review. We’re glad you enjoyed the variety of magazines we offer. We offer Pantone products as well, we always try to keep a diverse selection available for our customers.

reviews.author: Sarah Smith
reviews.text: Wonderful selection of obscure and foreign magazines, as well as imported notebooks. More convenient than Casa, for me— though I love Casa, too!
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan majalah langka dan asing yang luar biasa, serta buku catatan impor. Lebih praktis daripada Casa, menurut saya— meskipun saya juga menyukai Casa!
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re glad you enjoy our selection of international and hard to find magazines. We work hard to bring unique publications from around the world to our customers, and your support means a lot to us.

reviews.author: Tracey Stockton
reviews.text: I really appreciate this business. As many know, print media is in decline, causing many publications to shutter or become very difficult to find. The Magazine Cafe has opened my world view through its subscription service. As pretty much a shut in as a caregiver to my mother and throughout the pandemic, I can't state how much I appreciate this resource. A great store and great people! Go buy a magazine from this great little store!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat menghargai bisnis ini. Seperti yang banyak orang ketahui, media cetak sedang mengalami penurunan, menyebabkan banyak publikasi tutup atau menjadi sangat sulit ditemukan. Magazine Cafe telah membuka wawasan saya melalui layanan berlangganannya. Sebagai seseorang yang hampir selalu berada di rumah karena merawat ibu saya dan selama pandemi, saya tidak bisa mengungkapkan betapa saya menghargai sumber daya ini. Toko yang hebat dan orang-orang yang hebat! Ayo beli majalah dari toko kecil yang hebat ini!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for sharing this. Your words truly mean a lot to our team. We’re grateful that our magazine selection and subscription service have been helpful to you, and we appreciate your support for independent print media. It’s customers like you who help keep magazines and small newsstands alive.

reviews.author: Orlando Jauregui
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 star rating. We appreciate your support and hope to serve you again soon.

reviews.author: Selene Chang
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 star rating. We truly appreciate it.

reviews.author: michael maccari
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 star review. We’re grateful for your support of Magazine Cafe.

reviews.author: Grace Alignay
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for your rating. We always try improve and hope to make your next experience even better.

reviews.author: Tanya Lee
reviews.text: I am so happy I found this place online! Everytime I want a specific issue of a magazine I can’t find it locally. I have bought several specific magazines over time from Magazine Cafe as a result. I always get what I wanted/ordered very quickly and in good condition with the packaging they use. And I live on the other side of the USA! Thank you!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat senang menemukan tempat ini secara online! Setiap kali saya menginginkan edisi majalah tertentu, saya tidak dapat menemukannya di toko lokal. Karena itu, saya telah membeli beberapa majalah tertentu dari Magazine Cafe selama ini. Saya selalu mendapatkan apa yang saya inginkan/pesan dengan sangat cepat dan dalam kondisi baik dengan kemasan yang mereka gunakan. Dan saya tinggal di sisi lain Amerika Serikat! Terima kasih!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for your kind words. We’re glad you found the issues you needed and that everything arrived quickly and safely. We appreciate your support from across the country.

reviews.author: Karen Baker
reviews.text: we finally made it to Magazine cafe...it has all the magazines you want and some you did not know you wanted! I love this place!
reviews.textTranslated: Akhirnya kami sampai di Magazine Cafe... kafe ini punya semua majalah yang kamu inginkan dan beberapa majalah yang bahkan kamu tidak tahu kamu butuhkan! Aku suka tempat ini!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. We’re happy you enjoyed the selection. There’s always something new in our store.

reviews.author: Jersey PLO
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for your rating. We always try improve and hope to make your next experience even better.

reviews.author: Eric
reviews.text: Lack of customer service efficient.
reviews.textTranslated: Kurangnya layanan pelanggan yang efisien.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re sorry to hear this. This is not the experience we aim to provide. Please reach out to us directly so we can address your concern.

reviews.author: Alara
reviews.text: This place is such a cool hidden spot in Manhattan. They have such a huge variety of magazines (including international magazines!!) which I found incredibly interesting. If you’re looking for a specific (recent) magazine from a specific country, this is your place. While they didn’t have the particular magazine I was looking for in store (Vogue Japan March 23), the employee working inside was very helpful and directed me toward their website where I was able to order it easily. I don’t live in NYC, so while there was a pick up in store option, I chose to have it delivered. Even if you’re unable to come to the store, I would definitely check out their website!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar tempat tersembunyi yang keren di Manhattan. Mereka punya banyak sekali pilihan majalah (termasuk majalah internasional!!) yang menurut saya sangat menarik. Kalau Anda mencari majalah tertentu (terbaru) dari negara tertentu, ini tempatnya. Meskipun mereka tidak punya majalah yang saya cari di toko (Vogue Jepang edisi 23 Maret), karyawan yang bekerja di sana sangat membantu dan mengarahkan saya ke situs web mereka, tempat saya bisa memesannya dengan mudah. ​​Saya tidak tinggal di New York City, jadi meskipun ada opsi ambil di toko, saya memilih untuk diantar. Kalaupun Anda tidak bisa datang langsung ke toko, saya pasti akan mengunjungi situs web mereka!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for visiting us. We’re glad our team could assist you and that you found what you were looking for. We appreciate your recommendation.

reviews.author: Noname Noname
reviews.text: Magazines overpriced and received damaged because they were carelessly shoved into undersized bubble envelope. Just buy direct from the actual magazine sites or from non-third party sellers.
reviews.textTranslated: Majalah-majalahnya terlalu mahal dan diterima dalam keadaan rusak karena dimasukkan sembarangan ke dalam amplop gelembung yang terlalu kecil. Beli saja langsung dari situs majalah aslinya atau dari penjual non-pihak ketiga.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re sorry your order arrived in that condition. That shouldn’t happen. We do our packaging process with great attention. Please contact us for this kind of issue. We will address this as soon as poosible.

reviews.author: John Hoops
reviews.text: Glad I stumbled across this place today. Loved there selection. Friendly staff...Will visit soon.
reviews.textTranslated: Senang sekali saya menemukan tempat ini hari ini. Saya suka pilihan barangnya. Stafnya ramah... Akan segera berkunjung lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. We’re glad you enjoyed the selection and had a good experience with our team. Looking forward to seeing you again.

reviews.author: K M
reviews.text:
I placed an online order for a single issue of a particular magazine, and received an automated confirmation saying the order had been received, and an additional notification would be sent when the order shipped. I waited 5 days and did not receive a notification of shipment. I sent an inquiry to the email address listed on their website asking for a status update on the order. The following day, I received an automated notification that my order had been cancelled, without any explanation or response to my inquiry.

Maybe folks have better luck with in-store purchases? Cannot recommend online ordering at all.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan satu edisi majalah tertentu secara online, dan menerima konfirmasi otomatis yang menyatakan pesanan telah diterima, dan pemberitahuan tambahan akan dikirimkan ketika pesanan dikirim. Saya menunggu 5 hari dan tidak menerima pemberitahuan pengiriman. Saya mengirimkan pertanyaan ke alamat email yang tertera di situs web mereka untuk menanyakan status pesanan. Keesokan harinya, saya menerima pemberitahuan otomatis bahwa pesanan saya telah dibatalkan, tanpa penjelasan atau tanggapan atas pertanyaan saya.

Mungkin orang-orang lebih beruntung dengan pembelian langsung di toko? Saya sama sekali tidak merekomendasikan pemesanan online.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re sorry for the inconvenience and lack of communication. That’s not acceptable. We will make sure this does not happen again.

reviews.author: Abhi Goyal
reviews.text: Great place for everything and any magazine you need. Staff is super friendly and helpful. And they have coffee and snacks too!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk semua kebutuhan dan majalah Anda. Stafnya sangat ramah dan membantu. Mereka juga menyediakan kopi dan camilan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. We’re glad you enjoyed the selection and our space. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Dani Lukens
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback, Dani. We’d love to know how we can improve your experience.

reviews.author: Dominique J.
reviews.text: Worker lied to my face about the price of two magainzes. He told me it was $19 then charged me $91 and the screen facing the customer did not even show the price. When he handed me the recipt it said no returns. This business makes its earnings by lying and upcharging, don't make the mistake of buying here
reviews.textTranslated: Karyawan itu berbohong terang-terangan kepada saya tentang harga dua majalah. Dia bilang harganya $19, lalu menagih saya $91, dan layar yang menghadap pelanggan bahkan tidak menampilkan harga. Saat dia memberikan kuitansi kepada saya, tertulis "tidak menerima pengembalian". Bisnis ini mencari keuntungan dengan berbohong dan menaikkan harga, jangan sampai Anda melakukan kesalahan dengan membeli di sini.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for stopping by our store location. We have responded back to your email regarding the same. The price of the magazine is $45.99. The same is listed on our website. If there have been any mis understanding, we will gladly allow you to return the magazine. Customer satisfaction is most important to us.

reviews.author: Mary Case
reviews.text: This place is worth a visit just for the smell alone. Don’t let print magazines die!! Give them your business! A wonderful magazine shop which also sells high end soft drinks, gum, chocolates etc.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini layak dikunjungi hanya karena aromanya saja. Jangan biarkan majalah cetak mati!! Dukung mereka! Toko majalah yang luar biasa ini juga menjual minuman ringan kelas atas, permen karet, cokelat, dan lain-lain.
reviews.responseFromOwner: This means a lot, Mary. We love that you enjoyed the space and the vibe.

reviews.author: Ranjit Acharya
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Ranjit for leaving 5 star rating.

reviews.author: kathy mascio
reviews.text: I am writing an update to the review I left saying “I would not advise getting anything from this store”.  Upon receiving a notice from BBB that I had not received any reply on my repeated  inquiries about the rest of the magazines for the subscription that I had purchased for $362.00, they replied immediately and assured me that the magazines would be shipped soon.  I have in fact received 3 more magazines making a total of 5 of the 52 which I should receive.  I hope they will continue to fulfill their obligation.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menulis pembaruan untuk ulasan yang saya tinggalkan dengan mengatakan, "Saya tidak menyarankan membeli apa pun dari toko ini." Setelah menerima pemberitahuan dari BBB bahwa saya belum menerima balasan atas pertanyaan berulang saya tentang sisa majalah untuk langganan yang saya beli seharga $362,00, mereka segera membalas dan meyakinkan saya bahwa majalah-majalah itu akan segera dikirim. Bahkan, saya telah menerima 3 majalah lagi, sehingga totalnya menjadi 5 dari 52 majalah yang seharusnya saya terima. Saya harap mereka akan terus memenuhi kewajiban mereka.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
We appreciate you updating the review on Google.
Yes it is true that when we received your review on Google and a notification from BBB. We investigated further
and informed you the reason for a non response to your email was because it was delivered to our junk folder as it was marked as spam.
Since then we have been in touch with and resolved the issue.

reviews.author: Michael Small
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it, Michael for the 5 star rating.

reviews.author: Robert Gray
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Robert for your 5 star rating.

reviews.author: Megumi Taylor
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Megumi. Glad you had a good experience.

reviews.author: Madelyn Houck
reviews.text: order came in good condition although shipping took awhile): not much communication either
reviews.textTranslated: pesanan datang dalam kondisi baik meskipun pengirimannya agak lama): komunikasi juga kurang
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback, Madelyn. We’re glad it arrived safely and will work on improving shipping speed and communication.

reviews.author: KiKi Kimbro
reviews.text: Love this place. I enjoy perusing their variety of items — from pens to cards to fun tote bags to coffee and grab-and-go food items — in addition, of course, to this being my go-to place to buy domestic and foreign magazines. They have the best selection of magazines from so many countries in a wide variety of genres. I’m learning French, and my favorite is finding magazines from France here so I can practice (and see how the Parisians set the bar high with fashion!).
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka tempat ini. Saya senang melihat-lihat beragam barang mereka — mulai dari pulpen, kartu, tas jinjing yang lucu, kopi, dan makanan siap saji — selain itu, tentu saja, tempat ini juga menjadi tempat favorit saya untuk membeli majalah dalam dan luar negeri. Mereka punya koleksi majalah terbaik dari berbagai negara dalam beragam genre. Saya sedang belajar bahasa Prancis, dan favorit saya adalah menemukan majalah dari Prancis di sini agar saya bisa berlatih (dan melihat bagaimana orang Paris menetapkan standar tinggi dalam hal mode!).
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, KiKi. Love hearing how much you enjoyed the variety and international selection.

reviews.author: Michael Schaffer
reviews.text: They canceled my order without me telling them to and now I'm not getting my subscription.  Poor customer  service.  Will never recommend these Characters
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka membatalkan pesanan saya tanpa sepengetahuan saya dan sekarang saya tidak mendapatkan langganan saya. Layanan pelanggan yang buruk. Saya tidak akan pernah merekomendasikan karakter-karakter ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thank you for taking time to review us.
We have reviewed your Order and it was canceled as the delivery expectation for the first issue of the magazine was not being matched with your expectation.
Delivery time frame are controlled by the publisher not by us. Our customer service has responded back to each of your query in regards your order.

reviews.author: Maryellen Shute
reviews.text: Ordered an issue of Daphne’s Diary. It arrived within a week. It was packaged very well in a waterproof envelope. Very pleased with the service. Have now ordered a one year subscription through them. A+++
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan edisi Daphne’s Diary. Edisi tersebut tiba dalam waktu seminggu. Kemasannya sangat bagus dalam amplop tahan air. Sangat puas dengan pelayanannya. Sekarang saya telah memesan langganan satu tahun melalui mereka. A+++
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Maryellen. Glad everything arrived safely and that you’re happy with the service.

reviews.author: Sandy Sorkin
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Sandy for the 5 star rating.

reviews.author: Sanford M. Sorkin
reviews.text: Great selection of magazines.
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak pilihan majalah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it, Sanford for the 5 star rating.

reviews.author: Adam Pagano
reviews.text: This is a unique store with huge array of both local and international magazines.  The location also has a good deal of stationary and a bit of food.  Worth a look if you're looking for something new.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah toko unik dengan beragam majalah lokal dan internasional. Lokasi ini juga memiliki banyak alat tulis dan sedikit makanan. Patut dikunjungi jika Anda mencari sesuatu yang baru.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Adam. Glad you enjoyed the range and the space.

reviews.author: Noticias Musicales En Español
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars. We really appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Red Willow
reviews.text:
I ordered the Esquire Magazine Winter 2021-22 US Edition. What I received was the Esquire Magazine Spring 2022 UK Edition. I am very unhappy with my incorrect order.

March 4, 2022
Hello Magazine Cafe, do you have an update when your customer care representative plans to remediate this issue? Thank you.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya memesan Majalah Esquire Edisi Musim Dingin 2021-22 AS. Yang saya terima adalah Majalah Esquire Edisi Musim Semi 2022 Inggris. Saya sangat kecewa dengan pesanan saya yang salah.

4 Maret 2022
Halo Magazine Cafe, apakah ada informasi terbaru kapan perwakilan layanan pelanggan Anda berencana untuk memperbaiki masalah ini? Terima kasih.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Red Willow,
We apologize for any inconvenience and thanks for bringing this to our attention. Our customer care representative will be in touch to resolve this issue.

reviews.author: Olga Pinedo
reviews.text: Good attention, cozy, assorted
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan bagus, nyaman, beragam.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Olga. Glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and found a nice variety. We are happy that you had a relaxing visit.

reviews.author: Meli Meli
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks so much for the 5-star rating. It means a lot to us.

reviews.author: Rémy
reviews.text: Pretty cool store, lots of magazines, so much we had to ask several times the friendly seller where to find the ones we were looking for !
reviews.textTranslated: Toko yang cukup keren, banyak majalah, begitu banyaknya, kami harus bertanya beberapa kali kepada penjual yang ramah di mana menemukan majalah yang kami cari!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Remy. We’re glad our team could help you navigate the selection. There’s always something new to discover here.

reviews.author: Darryl Montoute
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate the 5 stars, Darryl. Hope to welcome you back again soon.

reviews.author: Terrence Butler
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Terrence. We’re grateful for your support.

reviews.author: dee 365
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback. We’d love to hear what we can improve to make your next visit better.

reviews.author: Ibou sarr Kane
reviews.text: Very useful
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bermanfaat
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you found it useful. Thanks for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.author: Sheetal
reviews.text: What a lovely idea behind this store. Perfect for someone like me who is crazy for magazines and you have magazines from around the world here.
reviews.textTranslated: Ide yang sangat bagus di balik toko ini. Sangat cocok untuk orang seperti saya yang tergila-gila dengan majalah, dan di sini tersedia majalah dari seluruh dunia.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Sheetal. It’s great to hear from someone who truly enjoys magazines. We’re glad you loved the international selection.

reviews.author: Virendra Kumar
reviews.text: Awesome collection of Magazine and very attentive and polite reps and always ready to help
reviews.textTranslated: Koleksi majalahnya luar biasa dan para perwakilannya sangat ramah dan sopan serta selalu siap membantu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Virendra. We really appreciate your kind words about the collection and our team.

reviews.author: AntMoNYC
reviews.text: Great place to find international magazines, especially those focused in fashion and entertainment. Not the largest selection in the city, but it's pretty big and it's very well organized.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk menemukan majalah internasional, terutama yang berfokus pada mode dan hiburan. Pilihannya memang bukan yang terlengkap di kota ini, tetapi cukup besar dan tertata rapi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it. Glad you enjoyed the international range and found everything well organized. We’re always adding new titles.

reviews.author: Richard Lakes
reviews.text: It had the most relaxing Vibe😁
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya sangat menenangkan😁
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Richard. Happy you enjoyed the vibe. It’s something we take pride in.

reviews.author: Angel Ovalles
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars, Angel. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Beatriz Ramirez
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks so much, Beatriz. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Heather Oakley
reviews.text: I have several subscriptions with Magazine Cafe. If there is ever an “issue,”  it is taken care of promptly. I’m very happy with this company.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memiliki beberapa langganan di Magazine Cafe. Jika ada "masalah," masalah tersebut segera ditangani. Saya sangat puas dengan perusahaan ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Heather. Glad we could sort things out quickly for you. Appreciate your continued trust.

reviews.author: Edoardo Marras
reviews.text: dude at the counter is dope. He's the reason I occasionally pop by.
reviews.textTranslated: Cowok di konter itu keren banget. Dialah alasan saya sesekali mampir.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Love hearing that. We’ll pass this on to the team. See you again soon.

reviews.author: Geovanny Artavia
reviews.text: Fina atencion y muy centrico en NY
reviews.textTranslated: Layanan yang sangat baik dan berlokasi sangat sentral di NY
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much. We’re glad you enjoyed the service and our central location in New York.

reviews.author: Tim Stock
reviews.text: helped me with an unusual magazine find. very helpful.
reviews.textTranslated: membantu saya menemukan majalah yang tidak biasa. sangat membantu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Happy we could help you find it, Tim. That’s what we’re here for.

reviews.author: Tula Lacy
reviews.text: This is a cool place to find unique magazines. The owner was warm and friendly. I was looking for high end fashion magazines with runway looks.  I found one I loved, albeit very pricy, but I  purchased it. I believe tourists would like this place. It has a real NY vibe to it. I will definitely return.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah tempat yang keren untuk menemukan majalah-majalah unik. Pemiliknya ramah dan bersahabat. Saya sedang mencari majalah mode kelas atas dengan tampilan runway. Saya menemukan satu yang saya sukai, meskipun sangat mahal, tetapi saya membelinya. Saya yakin wisatawan akan menyukai tempat ini. Tempat ini memiliki nuansa New York yang kental. Saya pasti akan kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Tula. Glad you found something special. We agree, it’s a unique space. Looking forward to your next visit.

reviews.author: Walter Paredes
reviews.text: Lugar acogedor, tranquilo, buena atención y un gran surtido de revistas
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang nyaman dan tenang dengan pelayanan yang baik dan pilihan majalah yang beragam.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Walter. We’re happy to hear you liked the atmosphere, service, and our wide selection of magazines.

reviews.author: Robyn A
reviews.text: This truly an amazing place. They go WAY above and beyond for you. I needed a peticular  magazine from KOREA, they not only got the magazines they sent it directly to the person I need it to go to. Hands  down the BEST. I WILL ALWAYS USE THEM. THEY ALWAYS RESPOND TO YOUR EMAILS AS WELL. YOU WONT BE DISAPPOINTED.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini benar-benar tempat yang luar biasa. Mereka benar-benar memberikan layanan terbaik. Saya butuh majalah spesial dari KOREA, mereka tidak hanya menerima majalah, tetapi juga mengirimkannya langsung ke orang yang saya butuhkan. Benar-benar TERBAIK. SAYA AKAN SELALU MENGGUNAKAN MEREKA. MEREKA JUGA SELALU MERESPON EMAIL ANDA. ANDA TIDAK AKAN KECEWA.
reviews.responseFromOwner: This means a lot, Robyn. We’re really glad we could help with your request. Thanks for trusting us again and again.

reviews.author: DJI Mavic air 2 Drone
reviews.text: Too slow
reviews.textTranslated: Terlalu lambat
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the feedback. We have improved our services and website speed as well. Hope to see you soon.

reviews.author: Shon Feliciano
reviews.text: Totally disappointed..  it's been awhile since I was last at the Magazine Cafe. They used to have a most Excellent selection of magazines from all over the World. Every topic & subject that you could have named they covered it. Now it's just a glorified cafe with some magazines that basically cover Art, Design, basic Sports and Crafts. Gone are the magazines that you could only find there... And the sad thing is they don't even realize how much business it's cost them. Oh well, I guess they can make money on what they stock. So sorry that I won't be buying from them anymore...
reviews.textTranslated: Kecewa banget.. udah lama banget sejak terakhir kali ke Magazine Cafe. Dulu mereka punya koleksi majalah yang luar biasa dari seluruh dunia. Semua topik & subjek yang bisa kamu sebutkan, mereka bahas. Sekarang cuma jadi kafe biasa dengan beberapa majalah yang isinya cuma Seni, Desain, Olahraga, dan Kerajinan Dasar. Hilang sudah majalah-majalah yang cuma bisa kamu temukan di sana... Dan yang menyedihkan, mereka bahkan nggak sadar berapa banyak kerugian yang mereka alami. Yah, mungkin mereka bisa untung dari stok mereka. Sayang banget aku nggak bakal beli lagi dari mereka...
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for sharing your thoughts, Shon. We hear you and are working to improve both our selection and overall experience.

reviews.author: Assistant at AUNRÉE JAC
reviews.text: It's great to have a place in midtown that provides an excellent variety of magz.
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat menyenangkan memiliki tempat di pusat kota yang menyediakan beragam majalah berkualitas tinggi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it. Glad we can be one of your go-to spots in Midtown.

reviews.author: Anjli Patel
reviews.text: Magazine Cafe has exceptional selection and customer service. My first purchase was nearly 11 (!) years ago, on March 21, 2010. All of my purchases have been online. Shipping is fast and relatively inexpensive. Customer service replies to emails in a timely manner. No request is too big or too small. Highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Magazine Cafe memiliki pilihan produk dan layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa. Pembelian pertama saya hampir 11 (!) tahun yang lalu, pada tanggal 21 Maret 2010. Semua pembelian saya dilakukan secara online. Pengiriman cepat dan relatif murah. Layanan pelanggan membalas email tepat waktu. Tidak ada permintaan yang terlalu besar atau terlalu kecil. Sangat direkomendasikan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Anjli. Your long-term support means a lot to us. Glad we’ve been able to deliver consistently.

reviews.author: Explore with me
reviews.text:
I ordered a magazine here.... after 3/4 weeks still nothing arrived. I mailed them a couple of times but no answers.
Bad communication
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya pesan majalah di sini.... setelah 3/4 minggu masih belum ada yang sampai. Saya sudah kirim email beberapa kali, tapi tidak ada balasan.
Komunikasi buruk.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re sorry to hear this. That’s not the experience we aim for. Please reach out again so we can resolve this for you quickly.

reviews.author: Gabriela B.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Gabriela. We appreciate it.

reviews.author: Ramesh Abhiraman
reviews.text: I ordered an issue of The Economist since the Economist's own app was not very good at single issue orders (that I could see). There was a small-mix up with the order, when I reported it by email on a weekend to Magazine Cafe, they fixed my download and replied courteously on Sunday. I have not tried their other e-resold magazine titles.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan satu edisi The Economist karena aplikasi Economist sendiri kurang bagus untuk pemesanan satu edisi (sejauh yang saya lihat). Ada sedikit kesalahan dalam pemesanan, ketika saya melaporkannya melalui email di akhir pekan ke Magazine Cafe, mereka memperbaiki unduhan saya dan membalas dengan sopan di hari Minggu. Saya belum mencoba judul majalah e-reseller mereka yang lain.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Ramesh. Glad we could fix that quickly for you. Appreciate you giving us a try.

reviews.author: Maria
reviews.text: Bhanu and the team at Magazine Cafe were exceptionally helpful in resolving my subscription conflicts.  I look forward to  receiving my magazines and to continued business with them.
reviews.textTranslated: Bhanu dan tim di Magazine Cafe sangat membantu dalam menyelesaikan masalah langganan saya. Saya berharap dapat menerima majalah-majalah saya dan terus berbisnis dengan mereka.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Maria. Glad Bhanu and the team could help. We appreciate your support and look forward to serving you again.

reviews.author: Daniel Velarde
reviews.text: Sent me a new magazine for free after they sent an incorrect issue by accident. Excellent help from the call center and great customer service!
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka mengirimkan majalah baru secara gratis setelah mereka salah kirim. Bantuan yang sangat baik dari pusat panggilan dan layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Daniel. Happy we could fix that quickly for you. Appreciate your kind words.

reviews.author: Mia Beeson
reviews.text: I ordered a notebook from this company 6 weeks ago and still have not received it. Every time I call to check on it they tell me it is in back order from the manufacturer. I ordered a notebook directly from said manufacturer 3 weeks ago and have already received it. I never write review, but this place is a scam. Do not order from here.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan buku catatan dari perusahaan ini 6 minggu yang lalu dan sampai sekarang belum menerimanya. Setiap kali saya menelepon untuk menanyakan status pesanan, mereka selalu mengatakan bahwa barang tersebut sedang dalam proses pemesanan ulang dari pabrik. Padahal, saya memesan buku catatan langsung dari pabrik tersebut 3 minggu yang lalu dan sudah menerimanya. Saya jarang menulis ulasan, tetapi tempat ini adalah penipuan. Jangan memesan dari sini.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Mia, we’re sorry for the delay and frustration. This isn’t the experience we aim to provide. Please share your order details with us so we can resolve this as soon as possible.

reviews.author: Jason Reu
reviews.text:
I never write reviews but the customer service was so horrible I have to say something...

I ordered 1 "At the Strand Puzzle" however they mistakenly charged me for and shipped me two (charged and shipped separately). Upon receiving the 2nd I've called and emailed requesting a return label and refund for the duplicate shipment. They claimed since they paid the shipping fees on the outbound shipments I should pay the shipping fee for the return however they advised I email their customer service department (info@magazinestore.com). I followed up with an email and was told they would not be providing a return label. WHY WOULD I PAY TO RETURN SOMETHING I DIDN'T ORDER? To date there has been no resolution on the matter. I would never order anything else from here or recommend it to anyone. STAY AWAY!
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya tidak pernah menulis ulasan, tetapi layanan pelanggannya sangat buruk, saya harus mengatakan sesuatu...

Saya memesan 1 "At the Strand Puzzle", tetapi mereka keliru menagih saya dan mengirimkan dua (ditagih dan dikirim terpisah). Setelah menerima yang kedua, saya menelepon dan mengirim email untuk meminta label pengembalian dan pengembalian dana untuk pengiriman yang sama. Mereka mengklaim bahwa karena mereka telah membayar biaya pengiriman untuk pengiriman keluar, saya harus membayar biaya pengiriman untuk pengembalian tersebut, tetapi mereka menyarankan saya untuk mengirim email ke layanan pelanggan mereka (info@magazinestore.com). Saya menindaklanjuti dengan email dan diberi tahu bahwa mereka tidak akan menyediakan label pengembalian. MENGAPA SAYA HARUS MEMBAYAR UNTUK MENGEMBALIKAN SESUATU YANG TIDAK SAYA PESAN? Sampai saat ini belum ada penyelesaian atas masalah ini. Saya tidak akan pernah memesan apa pun dari sini lagi atau merekomendasikannya kepada siapa pun. JANGAN ADA DI SINI!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Jason, we understand your frustration and apologize for the inconvenience. This shouldn’t have happened. Please reach out so we can review and resolve this properly.

reviews.author: Jeffery Crawford
reviews.text: I had 2 international magazine subscriptions through these guys. Both had hitches (not their fault) and they were always responsive and things were answered. Even with Covid-19 problems, they answered my questions as best they could in the moment, and ultimately resolved all issues I may have had. I have reviewed MANY subscription services and they all get horrible reviews. This service deserves a good one. I got a refund after lack of physical magazine delivery due to Covid issues. I didn't expect it. But am happy, they honored it and followed through. A+
reviews.textTranslated: Saya berlangganan dua majalah internasional melalui layanan ini. Kedua langganan tersebut mengalami kendala (bukan salah mereka), tetapi mereka selalu responsif dan menjawab semua pertanyaan. Bahkan dengan masalah Covid-19, mereka menjawab pertanyaan saya sebaik mungkin pada saat itu, dan akhirnya menyelesaikan semua masalah yang mungkin saya alami. Saya telah meninjau BANYAK layanan berlangganan dan semuanya mendapatkan ulasan buruk. Layanan ini pantas mendapatkan ulasan yang baik. Saya mendapatkan pengembalian dana setelah majalah fisik tidak sampai karena masalah Covid. Saya tidak menyangka akan mendapatkannya. Tetapi saya senang, mereka menepati janji dan menindaklanjutinya. Nilai A+.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Jeffery. We truly appreciate your patience and thoughtful feedback. Glad we could support you through those challenges.

reviews.author: DeUnequeTV Entertainment
reviews.text: All of the magazine 😍books 📚 you need with no hassle no worries
reviews.textTranslated: Semua majalah 😍buku 📚 yang Anda butuhkan tanpa repot, tanpa khawatir
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. Glad you’re enjoying the collection. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Andreas Bardas
reviews.text: Unable to provide no starts. I ordered back before covid and still no magazine, email reply or anything else. Before letting them charge your card for 220 for a mag subscription. Make sure to speak to a person. Their email and offices are not answering. I still have no mage multiple attempts at emails. Such a shame.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak bisa memberikan informasi awal. Saya sudah pesan kembali sebelum COVID dan masih belum ada balasan majalah, email, atau apa pun. Sebelum mereka menagih kartu Anda sebesar 220 untuk berlangganan majalah. Pastikan untuk bicara langsung dengan mereka. Email dan kantor mereka tidak menjawab. Saya masih belum bisa membalas email berkali-kali. Sayang sekali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Andreas, we’re really sorry to hear this. That’s not the experience we want for our customers. Please reach out so we can look into this and help you.

reviews.author: Lynn K.
reviews.text: 친절하고 다양한잡지가 많아요
reviews.textTranslated: Ada banyak majalah yang ramah dan beragam.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. We’re glad you liked the variety and service.

reviews.author: August tritt
reviews.text: i have been waiting a month for my order. I am trying to get a refund.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah menunggu pesanan saya selama sebulan. Saya sedang mencoba mendapatkan pengembalian dana.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi August, sorry for the delay. Please reach out to us and we’ll look into this.

reviews.author: Michael Germanio
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Michael. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: David Stout
reviews.text:
With recent book store closures ... I took a chance and ordered a single copy of Vantage magazine from MagazineCafe and was delighted with the service.  I just received my magazine in a padded envelope ... the magazine was in pristine condition ... thank you.

A couple of years ago I decided to subscribe to Vantage magazine through the publishers subscription service ... over the following year I received my quarterly magazine, wrapped in a thin plastic bag through the mail.  On three occasions the magazine was so badly damaged that I had to request a replacement.  When you are paying a subscription service for a quality magazine you expect to receive it in good condition.

Thank you.  Based on this positive experience I have now placed an annual subscription to Vantage from your company.

Take care and thank you !!
reviews.textTranslated:
Dengan penutupan toko buku baru-baru ini... saya mengambil risiko dan memesan satu eksemplar majalah Vantage dari MagazineCafe dan sangat senang dengan pelayanannya. Saya baru saja menerima majalah saya dalam amplop berlapis busa... majalah tersebut dalam kondisi prima... terima kasih.

Beberapa tahun yang lalu saya memutuskan untuk berlangganan majalah Vantage melalui layanan berlangganan penerbit... selama tahun berikutnya saya menerima majalah triwulanan saya, dibungkus dalam kantong plastik tipis melalui pos. Pada tiga kesempatan, majalah tersebut sangat rusak sehingga saya harus meminta penggantian. Ketika Anda membayar layanan berlangganan untuk majalah berkualitas, Anda berharap menerimanya dalam kondisi baik.

Terima kasih. Berdasarkan pengalaman positif ini, saya sekarang telah berlangganan tahunan Vantage dari perusahaan Anda.

Hati-hati dan terima kasih!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, David. Glad your magazine arrived in perfect condition. We really appreciate your trust and your new subscription.

reviews.author: Valentina Giulietti
reviews.text:
Order the Rolling stones magazine with Harry Styles on the cover at the end of August 2019. i haven’t received the order yet and it’s now May 2020! The customer care is ridiculous, no reply and no solutions. I sent tons of emails, complains and feedbacks but received 0 REPLY.
I can't find my order and I paid a lot of money for my magazine. I will never use their services again. Ridiculous and unprofessional
reviews.textTranslated:
Pesan majalah Rolling Stones dengan sampul Harry Styles di akhir Agustus 2019. Saya belum menerima pesanannya, padahal sekarang sudah Mei 2020! Layanan pelanggannya sungguh menyebalkan, tidak ada balasan dan tidak ada solusi. Saya sudah mengirim banyak email, keluhan, dan umpan balik, tetapi tidak menerima BALASAN.
Saya tidak dapat menemukan pesanan saya dan saya sudah membayar mahal untuk majalah saya. Saya tidak akan pernah menggunakan layanan mereka lagi. Sungguh konyol dan tidak profesional.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Valentina, we’re very sorry for the experience you had. This is not acceptable and not the service we aim to provide. Please share your order details so we can investigate and resolve this for you.

reviews.author: Mary Moss
reviews.text: Small but good selection of fashion magazines.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan majalah mode yang terbatas namun berkualitas.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Mary. Glad you liked the selection. We’re always working to bring in more great titles.

reviews.author: Mary Kate Lyons
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Mary Kate. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Mauricio Corral
reviews.text: GENIAL ! este lugar es indescriptible por sus sabores, ambiente animado y decoración. Además su ubicación es de lujo.
reviews.textTranslated: LUAR BIASA! Tempat ini sungguh tak terlukiskan karena cita rasanya, suasananya yang meriah, dan dekorasinya. Ditambah lagi, lokasinya fantastis.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Mauricio. We’re glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and experience. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: joe piro
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks Joe, we appreciate the support. Glad you had a good experience.

reviews.author: Hello Krishna
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much Krishna for the 5 star rating.

reviews.author: E J Torres
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback. We’d love to know how we can improve your experience next time.

reviews.text: I went in there looking for some magazines. Don't really like giving a bad review. Every human is the same please remember that.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya ke sana untuk mencari beberapa majalah. Saya tidak suka memberi ulasan buruk. Setiap orang itu sama, tolong ingat itu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We appreciate you sharing this. We’re always working to create a welcoming space for everyone and your feedback helps.

reviews.author: Dawn Dais
reviews.text: So many magazines....
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak sekali majalah....
reviews.responseFromOwner: Yes, we do have quite a collection. Glad you noticed. Hope you found something you liked.

reviews.author: Melony Gahan
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you Melony. We really appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Jerry Washington II
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your rating. Let us know how we can make your next visit better.

reviews.author: Frank A
reviews.text: The owner was really nice and helpful
reviews.textTranslated: Pemiliknya sangat baik dan membantu
reviews.responseFromOwner: That means a lot. We’ll pass this on. Glad you had a good experience.

reviews.author: Aleksandra Kandinov
reviews.text: Big choice of magazines and kind staff.
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak pilihan majalah dan stafnya ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you Aleksandra. Happy to hear you liked the selection and the team.

reviews.author: rebeca batista
reviews.text: If you are looking for amazing international fashion magazines and other subjects, this is the place to go. They have a great selection of magazines. I loved it! Going back there very soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Jika Anda mencari majalah mode internasional yang menarik dan topik lainnya, inilah tempatnya. Mereka punya banyak pilihan majalah. Saya suka sekali! Saya akan segera kembali ke sana!
reviews.responseFromOwner: This is great to hear. We’re glad you enjoyed the variety. Looking forward to seeing you again soon.

reviews.author: David Sandoval
reviews.text: Es una mezcla de cultura y relax.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah perpaduan antara budaya dan relaksasi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks David. We're glad you liked the atmosphere.

reviews.author: William Turner
reviews.text: Great selection.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan yang bagus.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks William. Glad you liked the selection.

reviews.author: Vasyl Popovich
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you Vasyl for the 5 star rating.

reviews.author: Sofia Davis
reviews.text: Great
reviews.textTranslated: Besar
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks Sofia. Glad you had a good experience.

reviews.author: UWSGRRRL
reviews.text:
I have been ordering an Italian Magazine for my mother from Magazine Cafe for a few years.  I speak with Bhanu by phone or e-mail.  He is always helpful, professional & answers any questions I have promptly.

I haven’t had any issues with delivery.  I live in another state so I have never been to the store. However, next time I am in NYC, I will stop by with my mother to check it out.

Previously, I used to order the Italian magazine from another company.  Delivery was late often & sometimes a magazine was never received.  This magazine has a continuous storyline, so if an issue is never received, it’s like reading a book with pages missing.  Dealing with them was awful.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya sudah memesan majalah Italia untuk ibu saya dari Magazine Cafe selama beberapa tahun. Saya berkomunikasi dengan Bhanu melalui telepon atau email. Dia selalu membantu, profesional, dan menjawab pertanyaan saya dengan cepat.

Saya belum pernah mengalami masalah dengan pengiriman. Saya tinggal di negara bagian lain, jadi saya belum pernah ke toko. Namun, lain kali saya berada di NYC, saya akan mampir bersama ibu saya untuk melihatnya.

Sebelumnya, saya biasa memesan majalah Italia dari perusahaan lain. Pengiriman sering terlambat dan terkadang majalah tidak pernah sampai. Majalah ini memiliki alur cerita yang berkelanjutan, jadi jika suatu edisi tidak pernah sampai, itu seperti membaca buku dengan halaman yang hilang. Berurusan dengan mereka sangat buruk.
reviews.responseFromOwner: This means a lot. Bhanu will be happy to hear this. Thanks for your continued support over the years.

reviews.author: Andrei Borzykh
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Andrei. We appreciate it.

reviews.author: The Artist Exchange
reviews.text: Loved the atmosphere... clean with great customer service
reviews.textTranslated: Suka sekali dengan suasananya... bersih dengan layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you enjoyed the atmosphere and service. We work hard to keep the space clean and welcoming.

reviews.author: Nestor Valle
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your rating, Nestor. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Crispin Neuberk
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate the 5 stars, Crispin. That means a lot.

reviews.author: Giovanny Aguilar
reviews.text: Nice places!!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Giovanny. Happy you liked the place.

reviews.author: L. Michael Sanabria
reviews.text: Very goodood with fashion; sort of weak for interior design. Also good if you want back issues which they keep longer than usual
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus dalam hal mode; agak kurang dalam hal desain interior. Juga bagus jika Anda menginginkan edisi lama yang mereka simpan lebih lama dari biasanya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the detailed feedback, Michael. Great to hear you enjoy the fashion selection and back issues. We will work on improving the interior design range.

reviews.author: Destiny DeStefano
reviews.text: I’ve been using Magazine Cafe as my magazine resource for a couple years now and am always pleased. They’re reliable and even take the time to ask preference on covers if they have options available. I HIGHLY appreciate the work they do!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah menggunakan Magazine Cafe sebagai sumber majalah saya selama beberapa tahun dan selalu puas. Mereka tepercaya dan bahkan meluangkan waktu untuk menanyakan preferensi sampul jika ada pilihan yang tersedia. Saya SANGAT menghargai pekerjaan mereka!
reviews.responseFromOwner: This means a lot, Destiny. We are glad you trust us and appreciate the little things like cover preferences. Always happy to help.

reviews.author: John Ozed
reviews.text: Wonderful shop good staff
reviews.textTranslated: Toko yang luar biasa, stafnya ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, John. We are glad you enjoyed the shop and our team.

reviews.author: James Mughal
reviews.text: Great Selection.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan yang bagus.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you. We are always adding more to keep the selection fresh.

reviews.author: Anna Maria Cannizzo
reviews.text: No esta mal

reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback, Anna. We appreciate you stopping by.

reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your honest feedback. We are glad you liked the selection. We hear you on space and cleanliness and will keep improving.

reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Qwentin. Glad you enjoyed the coffee.

reviews.text: Great place
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it, Hassan. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Randy Powell
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Randy. We appreciate your support.

reviews.author: Selena Kyle
reviews.text: Very good selection and at times, very good staff. But good luck getting in a special order or finding a specific magazine you want.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan majalahnya sangat bagus dan terkadang stafnya juga sangat ramah. Tapi semoga beruntung jika ingin memesan secara khusus atau menemukan majalah tertentu yang Anda inginkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the honest feedback, Selena. We are glad you like the selection. We will work on improving special orders and helping customers find specific titles more easily.

reviews.author: JEFFREY BERMAN
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Jeffrey. We appreciate it.

reviews.author: Barb Hart
reviews.text: The customer service at Magazine Cafe exceeded my expectations. There was a shipping delay on an item I needed to receive by a certain time. The item was shipped on time by Magazine Cafe, however was delayed by the shipping company. Magazine Cafe staff went above and beyond to make certain my item made it across country in time. The staff was pleasant, courteous and helpful and provided excellent communication.  I will do business with them again and highly recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan pelanggan di Magazine Cafe melebihi ekspektasi saya. Ada keterlambatan pengiriman untuk barang yang harus saya terima pada waktu tertentu. Barang tersebut dikirim tepat waktu oleh Magazine Cafe, namun mengalami keterlambatan dari perusahaan pengiriman. Staf Magazine Cafe melakukan upaya luar biasa untuk memastikan barang saya sampai tepat waktu ke seluruh negeri. Stafnya ramah, sopan, dan membantu, serta memberikan komunikasi yang sangat baik. Saya akan berbisnis dengan mereka lagi dan sangat merekomendasikannya!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Barb. We’re glad we could help get it to you on time. Appreciate your kind words and support.

reviews.author: Cedric Martin
reviews.text: Un choix de magazines énorme....mais l'accueil est moyen
reviews.textTranslated: Banyak sekali pilihan majalah...tapi penerimaan pembacanya biasa saja
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your feedback. We’re glad you enjoyed the wide selection of magazines. We’ll work on improving the welcome and overall customer experience.

reviews.author: Family Gamer Review
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the rating. We appreciate it.

reviews.author: Camille Forte
reviews.text: This is the place to get the magazines you won't find anywhere else, publications on every subject and from every country. The fashion selection is amazing, and while many can't indulge in those new issues with $500-$1000 price tags, the sale section has something affordable for everyone! Even the discounted, past issues are a world above what you'd find at a run-of-the-mill bookstore or newsstand.
reviews.textTranslated: Di sinilah tempat untuk mendapatkan majalah-majalah yang tak akan Anda temukan di tempat lain, publikasi tentang segala topik dan dari setiap negara. Pilihan busananya luar biasa, dan meskipun banyak yang enggan membeli edisi baru dengan harga $500-$1000, bagian obral menawarkan sesuatu yang terjangkau untuk semua orang! Bahkan edisi-edisi lama yang didiskon pun jauh lebih baik daripada yang biasa Anda temukan di toko buku atau kios koran biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Camille. Glad you enjoyed the selection and found something in the sale section too.

reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Luke.

reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your rating. Hope to see you again.

reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate the 5 stars, Rachel.

reviews.text: Good cappuccino!!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Cappuccino-nya enak sekali!!!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you enjoyed the cappuccino. Thanks for stopping by.

reviews.author: Kimberly N Chin-Griffin
reviews.text: A magazine store! I thought they went the way of the dodo! Excellent general selection. If you love fashion, they have more fashion mags and journals than I've ever seen. Who knew?
reviews.textTranslated: Toko majalah! Kukira toko majalah sudah punah! Pilihan majalahnya sangat bagus. Jika kamu menyukai mode, mereka punya lebih banyak majalah dan jurnal mode daripada yang pernah kulihat. Siapa sangka?
