reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate it, Kate.

reviews.author: Carine Alexis
reviews.text: I fell in love with the New Yorker’s latest cover and immediately wanted to buy it in person. This store not only had the issue I wanted, but also had plenty of niche publications, stationary, and snacks to buy as well.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya jatuh cinta dengan sampul terbaru New Yorker dan langsung ingin membelinya langsung. Toko ini tidak hanya menyediakan edisi yang saya inginkan, tetapi juga menyediakan banyak publikasi, alat tulis, dan camilan khusus untuk dibeli.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you found the issue you wanted. Thanks for visiting and exploring the store.

reviews.author: Monica Reese
reviews.text: They didn't have the magazine I was searching for but the staff was friendly
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka tidak memiliki majalah yang saya cari, tetapi stafnya ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Sorry we didn’t have it this time. Glad our team could help. Hope to see you again.

reviews.author: Benny G
reviews.text: Lovely store and great help. Bought magazines in store and shipped to me next day. Will return soon for my September fashion issues. Thanks
reviews.textTranslated: Toko yang bagus dan pelayanan yang luar biasa. Saya membeli majalah di toko dan dikirimkan keesokan harinya. Saya akan segera kembali untuk membeli edisi mode bulan September. Terima kasih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Benny. Happy we could assist with both in-store and shipping. See you again soon.

reviews.author: Luis Marin
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars, Luis.

reviews.author: Berta Jottar
reviews.text: I called several time to find out if they sold a magazine and they just would not look for it or tell me to call back
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menelepon beberapa kali untuk menanyakan apakah mereka menjual majalah tersebut, tetapi mereka sama sekali tidak mau mencarinya atau menyuruh saya menelepon kembali.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Sorry about your experience, Berta. We’ll work on improving our phone support and responsiveness.

reviews.author: Jim Smith
reviews.text: Excellent selection of global magazines
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihan majalah global yang luar biasa
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks, Jim. Glad you enjoyed the global selection.

reviews.author: Amanda Cruse
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate the 5 stars, Amanda.

reviews.author: Byoung Chan Kim
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Canela.

reviews.author: Canela Pontelli
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars.

reviews.author: Steven-Patrick Brown
reviews.text:
I visited this magazine store in hopes of finding an awesome issue for 2018.

For about fourth-five minutes I was happy being able to view the magazine until I was shouted at over the balcony of the store by a shop worker for opening the plastic of a magazine. He stated that I must ask them before opening the plastic.

Note, this was my first in the shop and was not aware of the protocol but the worker just kept yelling at me. Persisting that I must ask.

However, one of the other workers on duty apologized for his coworkers action but I was still unsettled by how I was approached about the misunderstanding so I left the shop immediately.

This shop expects you to buy a product you can try out or view before purchasing.

I would not recommend going here AT ALL. Not a pleasant atmosphere.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya mengunjungi toko majalah ini dengan harapan menemukan edisi yang bagus untuk tahun 2018.

Selama sekitar empat puluh lima menit saya senang bisa melihat-lihat majalah tersebut sampai saya diteriaki dari balkon toko oleh seorang pekerja toko karena membuka plastik majalah. Dia menyatakan bahwa saya harus meminta izin sebelum membuka plastik tersebut.

Perlu dicatat, ini adalah kunjungan pertama saya ke toko tersebut dan saya tidak mengetahui protokolnya, tetapi pekerja itu terus meneriaki saya. Dia bersikeras bahwa saya harus meminta izin.

Namun, salah satu pekerja lain yang bertugas meminta maaf atas tindakan rekannya, tetapi saya masih merasa tidak nyaman dengan cara saya didekati mengenai kesalahpahaman tersebut, jadi saya segera meninggalkan toko.

Toko ini mengharapkan Anda untuk membeli produk yang dapat Anda coba atau lihat sebelum membeli.

Saya sama sekali tidak merekomendasikan untuk pergi ke sini. Suasananya tidak menyenangkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Steven. We appreciate you stopping by the store and browsing through the wonderful magazine selection that has been displayed on our storefront. I did review the incident with the co workers here and it seems that you were spotted taking pictures of the inside of the magazine. For which you were approached the first time by one of our team members. Then you had moved on to another section and began to unwrap a magazine which the publisher wants us to keep in plastic to keep the integrity of the magazine. Our workers were simply complying to the rules of the store. However we welcome you to please stop by the store and I would personally like attend to you. We hope you give us another chance. Thanks

reviews.author: saketh b
reviews.text: "They made my day. Only place to carry Vogue India. Fast delivery and magazine came wrapped in plastic. Great customer service."
reviews.textTranslated: "Mereka membuat hari saya menyenangkan. Satu-satunya tempat yang menjual Vogue India. Pengiriman cepat dan majalahnya dibungkus plastik. Layanan pelanggannya luar biasa."
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad we could make your day. Happy you found Vogue India with us. Appreciate your kind words.

reviews.author: Robert & Ashleigh Marshall
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate the 5 stars. Thank you.

reviews.author: Jay Booker
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars, Jay.

reviews.author: Chris RLX H.
reviews.text: Awesome concept, great place! Must experience for yourself!
reviews.textTranslated: Konsepnya keren, tempatnya keren! Wajib dicoba sendiri!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Love that you enjoyed it. Thanks for visiting.

reviews.author: deltera best
reviews.text: DO NOT SHOP ON THIS WEB!!  I ordered 2 fashion magazines. But the usps guys returned my stuff. Then I called customer service to explain this situation and asked for re-shipping. They told me they would give me a feedback one day later by email. However, after 1 week, I received a call told me that I MUST PAY FOR MY SHIPPING FEE AGAIN!!! I complained this situation and asked for return for all of my money.  The customer service guys said me he would report to his manager and gave me an answer. Guess what?! 1 week later, I received a notice from my bank and they only returned the amount excluding shipping fee!! And NO EMAIL, NO NOTICE FROM THEM!!!
reviews.textTranslated: JANGAN BELANJA DI WEB INI!! Saya memesan 2 majalah mode. Tapi pihak USPS mengembalikan barang saya. Lalu saya menelepon layanan pelanggan untuk menjelaskan situasi ini dan meminta pengiriman ulang. Mereka bilang akan memberi saya tanggapan satu hari kemudian melalui email. Namun, setelah 1 minggu, saya menerima telepon yang mengatakan bahwa saya HARUS MEMBAYAR BIAYA PENGIRIMAN SAYA LAGI!!! Saya mengeluhkan situasi ini dan meminta pengembalian semua uang saya. Pihak layanan pelanggan bilang akan melapor ke manajernya dan memberi saya jawaban. Coba tebak?! 1 minggu kemudian, saya menerima pemberitahuan dari bank saya dan mereka hanya mengembalikan jumlah yang belum termasuk biaya pengiriman!! Dan TIDAK ADA EMAIL, TIDAK ADA PEMBERITAHUAN DARI MEREKA!!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Sorry to hear about your experience. We understand your concern and will review this internally. Please reach out to us directly so we can resolve this properly.

reviews.author: Maggie Yu
reviews.text:
This is the first time I order from them. But also is my last time. Feel so upset, before I order from them already email and ask them if my magazine with come with whatever they come with, I order this magazine a long time with other store, they all come with the promotion gift. This is the first time I only got the magazine:(
I order three months, this is my first month received, I needs to cancel the rest of issue. Please refund my money back.
DO NOT ORDER from them. Disappointed
reviews.textTranslated:
Ini pertama kalinya saya memesan dari mereka. Tapi juga terakhir kalinya. Saya sangat kecewa, sebelum memesan dari mereka saya sudah mengirim email dan bertanya apakah majalah saya akan disertai dengan hadiah promosi. Saya sudah memesan majalah ini sejak lama dari toko lain, dan semuanya disertai dengan hadiah promosi. Ini pertama kalinya saya hanya menerima majalah saja :(
Saya memesan untuk tiga bulan, ini bulan pertama yang saya terima, saya perlu membatalkan sisa edisi. Mohon kembalikan uang saya.
JANGAN MEMESAN dari mereka. Sangat mengecewakan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Maggie
We appreciate you have communicated your concern. We ship the magazines as is from the publisher. We don't add or remove anything from them. Since you were not satisfied with the purchase, we have honored your request for a refund and it has been issued. Please check your bank statement in 3-5 days for it to reflect on it.
Thanks

reviews.author: Jang Choe
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for your rating. Hope to see you again.

reviews.author: Serissa Ramos
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate your feedback. Thank you.

reviews.author: Alison Huang
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars.

reviews.author: John Brown
reviews.text:
Terrible website - spent two days trying to subscribe to a magazine. Website is amateurish at best.  Entered all my information and then could not get it to complete, tried again just now, then called their 212 number - spoke to a man with heavy accent.  He was very rude to me, told me to change my browser to Chrome or Firefox, said that the latest Microsoft Internet Explorer is not supported.  When I said Explorer is the most used browser in the world, he had more rude comments and hung up on me.
DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH these awful people.
reviews.textTranslated:
Situs web yang mengerikan - saya menghabiskan dua hari mencoba berlangganan majalah. Situs webnya sangat amatir. Saya memasukkan semua informasi saya dan kemudian tidak dapat menyelesaikannya, mencoba lagi barusan, lalu menelepon nomor 212 mereka - berbicara dengan seorang pria dengan aksen yang kental. Dia sangat kasar kepada saya, menyuruh saya mengganti browser saya ke Chrome atau Firefox, mengatakan bahwa Microsoft Internet Explorer terbaru tidak didukung. Ketika saya mengatakan Explorer adalah browser yang paling banyak digunakan di dunia, dia memberikan komentar yang lebih kasar dan menutup telepon.
JANGAN BERBISNIS DENGAN orang-orang yang mengerikan ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear John
Thank you for contacting us. Yes we did receive your call and it is a pity that without using our services you are ready to rate us based on someone's accent and ethnicity. The representative was trying to bring to your attention that Internet Explorer is a obsolete browser. Microsoft does not support it and the website experience will not be up to the mark. Here is an article about the same : https://www.theverge.com/2016/1/6/10722426/internet-explorer-8-9-10-dying. Its a shame that a person who is trying to resolve your issue is being shamed as Awful because of his accent.

reviews.author: Bobbie Morris
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the support, Bobbie.

reviews.author: riley parker
reviews.text: Great selection! Always has what I'm looking for.
reviews.textTranslated: Pilihannya bagus! Selalu ada yang saya cari.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you always find what you need. Thanks for your support.

reviews.author: Audrey Wolfe
reviews.text: DO NOT SHOP HERE. Ordered a year subscription in January, they took the money out of my account, and I have YET to receive the subscription despite many conversations with the staff.. bad bad bad service.
reviews.textTranslated: JANGAN BELANJA DI SINI. Saya memesan langganan tahunan di bulan Januari, tetapi mereka menarik uang dari rekening saya, dan saya BELUM menerima langganan tersebut meskipun sudah banyak berdiskusi dengan staf. Layanannya sangat buruk.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Sorry for the inconvenience caused. We take this seriously and will look into it. Please contact us so we can assist further.

reviews.author: VINAY JAIN
reviews.text:
One of the most popular book houses of New York  and is  having the best  collection of best Global magazines.

Sip a cup of hot Coffee while browsing the latest magazines.

Extensive collection  of titles makes the place a must visit and the  courtesy extended to  customers is  top class.
reviews.textTranslated:
Salah satu toko buku paling populer di New York dan memiliki koleksi majalah global terbaik.

Nikmati secangkir kopi panas sambil menelusuri majalah-majalah terbaru.

Koleksi judul yang luas menjadikan tempat ini wajib dikunjungi dan keramahan yang diberikan kepada pelanggan sangat luar biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for such a detailed review. Glad you enjoyed the collection and the experience.

reviews.author: Nicholas Matranga
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars.

reviews.author: Riley Berger
reviews.text: Great shop with an incredible selection of magazines.
reviews.textTranslated: Toko yang bagus dengan pilihan majalah yang luar biasa.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you liked the selection. Thanks for visiting.

reviews.author: Phil Goulstone
reviews.text: Amazing selection of magazines from around the world.
reviews.textTranslated: Koleksi majalah yang luar biasa dari seluruh dunia.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Happy you enjoyed the global range. Appreciate it.

reviews.author: Olanquan TV
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the 5 stars.

reviews.author: Thịnh Hoàng
reviews.text: Despite the price, I decided to buy Mens Non No from Magazine Cafe because it was the only place selling this magazine. I was really happy because I got my first issue just 2 days after I placed the order. However, the second issue did not come and I had to call them at the end of month. When it came, it did not come with the promotional gift that was supposedly attached to the magazine and the gift was one of the major reasons why I bought Mens Non No. Very disappointed and frustrated.
reviews.textTranslated: Meskipun harganya mahal, saya memutuskan untuk membeli Mens Non No dari Magazine Cafe karena itu satu-satunya tempat yang menjual majalah ini. Saya sangat senang karena edisi pertama saya sampai hanya 2 hari setelah saya memesan. Namun, edisi kedua tidak kunjung datang dan saya harus menghubungi mereka di akhir bulan. Ketika edisi kedua tiba, ternyata tidak ada hadiah promosi yang seharusnya disertakan bersama majalah tersebut, padahal hadiah itu adalah salah satu alasan utama saya membeli Mens Non No. Sangat kecewa dan frustrasi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for contacting us about this. Our customer support team is already in touch with you. They will resolve the issue as soon as possible. We appreciate that you took time to bring this to our attention since we ship the magazines as is we receive them from the publishers.

reviews.author: Tori Harrington
reviews.text: Very polite staff, great selection of magazines
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya sangat sopan, pilihan majalahnya sangat banyak.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you had a good experience with our team. Thanks for the kind words.

reviews.author: Ameer Hassan
reviews.text: This place is absolutely amazing! Today i went in thinking i wouldn't find the I-D magazine that is published in the UK. I was looking for the one with Adele on the cover. I went in and there it was, staring at me. I absolutely love this place and would be back for all my international and local magazine needs.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini sungguh luar biasa! Hari ini saya ke sana karena mengira tidak akan menemukan majalah I-D yang terbit di Inggris. Saya mencari majalah bergambar Adele di sampulnya. Saya masuk dan ternyata ada majalah itu, menatap saya. Saya sangat suka tempat ini dan akan kembali lagi untuk semua kebutuhan majalah internasional dan lokal saya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Love this, Ameer. Glad you found the I-D issue you were looking for. We’ll keep it ready for your next visit too.

reviews.author: Bryan Yurcan
reviews.text: I go to this place for my hard-to-find European soccer magazines. They had some English-language Serie A magazine from Canada I had never seen before.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya pergi ke tempat ini untuk mencari majalah sepak bola Eropa yang sulit ditemukan. Mereka punya beberapa majalah Serie A berbahasa Inggris dari Kanada yang belum pernah saya lihat sebelumnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: That’s great to hear, Bryan. Happy you’re finding those rare football magazines with us.

reviews.author: Sherry Tate
reviews.text:
HORRIBLE CUSTOMER SERVICE!  Ordered a magazine and after 4 months and no magazine, all i received were emails saying that i would receive it soon.  When i called the "manager" (it seems that there are only two people working there, bc i talked to the same people everytime) was rude and called me names and spoke to me as if i were stupid.  THIS COMPANY IS A JOKE!!! DO NOT USE!!!!
STILL HAVEN'T GOTTEN MY MONEY BACK!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
LAYANAN PELANGGAN YANG BURUK! Saya memesan majalah dan setelah 4 bulan tidak ada majalah, yang saya terima hanyalah email yang mengatakan bahwa saya akan segera menerimanya. Ketika saya menelepon "manajer" (sepertinya hanya ada dua orang yang bekerja di sana, karena saya berbicara dengan orang yang sama setiap kali) dia kasar dan memaki saya serta berbicara kepada saya seolah-olah saya bodoh. PERUSAHAAN INI BODOH!!! JANGAN DIGUNAKAN!!!!
MASIH BELUM MENDAPATKAN UANG SAYA KEMBALI!!!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Dear Sherry
Domestic magazines are shipped by the publisher directly. They provide us with a shipping estimate date where thereafter we can contact them in an event of delivery problems. We did contact the publisher in this case and were waiting for a response back from them. We do understand that your magazine was not delivered and you had asked for a refund. Your refund was indeed processed and will be showing up on your statement in the time frame the credit card company take. We are still checking with the publisher to resolve and see if they could send you the magazine for the inconvenience caused. Thanks

reviews.author: Amber Oliver
reviews.text: It's a store full of fabulous magazines conveniently located in midtown. They have all kinds of magazines so it's easy to get your fix of varied topics and such. They also have coffee and treats to eat while you look for your favorite mag. I would definitely recommend it to magazine lovers!!
reviews.textTranslated: Ini adalah toko yang penuh dengan majalah-majalah luar biasa dan berlokasi strategis di pusat kota. Mereka memiliki berbagai macam majalah sehingga mudah untuk mendapatkan majalah dengan beragam topik. Mereka juga menyediakan kopi dan camilan untuk dinikmati sambil Anda mencari majalah favorit Anda. Saya sangat merekomendasikannya untuk para pecinta majalah!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you, Amber. Glad you enjoyed the variety and the cafe experience. Hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Becky Hare
reviews.text:
MAGAZINE CAFE took excellent care of my order.  The  particular ELLE UK magazine I wanted was one my Granddaughter had been looking for
since the end of July, 2013.  By accident, Magazine Cafe's site appeared and there was the magazine I wanted!  I called to make sure they still had the Sept. issue and the gentleman I spoke with was very nice and checked to be sure they still had copies.  I placed the order right away and the magazine arrived about a week later and in PERFECT condition.  THANK YOU, Magazine Cafe!!!  I was so PLEASED to find you and to do business with you.  Now I know where to find a UNIQUE issue at a reasonable price for both magazine and shipping!  God's Blessings to you all & you will "see" me again in the future!  Becky in Kansas City Missouri
reviews.textTranslated: MAGAZINE CAFE menangani pesanan saya dengan sangat baik. Majalah ELLE UK tertentu yang saya inginkan adalah majalah yang dicari cucu perempuan saya sejak akhir Juli 2013. Secara tidak sengaja, situs Magazine Cafe muncul dan di sana ada majalah yang saya inginkan! Saya menelepon untuk memastikan mereka masih memiliki edisi September dan pria yang saya ajak bicara sangat ramah dan memeriksa untuk memastikan mereka masih memiliki salinannya. Saya langsung memesan dan majalah tersebut tiba sekitar seminggu kemudian dan dalam kondisi SEMPURNA. TERIMA KASIH, Magazine Cafe!!! Saya sangat SENANG menemukan Anda dan berbisnis dengan Anda. Sekarang saya tahu di mana menemukan edisi UNIK dengan harga yang wajar untuk majalah dan pengiriman! Semoga Tuhan memberkati Anda semua & Anda akan "melihat" saya lagi di masa mendatang! Becky di Kansas City Missouri
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much, Becky. We’re really glad we could help you find that special issue. Your kind words mean a lot to us.

reviews.author: Emily Hanhan
reviews.text: I'm utterly impressed by the magazines they have in store. Since it's in the Garment District, there's a definite focus on fashion magazines. Being able to buy international magazines is so awesome - I find them more inspiring and worth a purchase. You could spend a long time perusing magazines, deciding which to buy, so come with time to spare!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sangat terkesan dengan majalah-majalah yang mereka sediakan. Karena berada di Distrik Garmen, fokusnya jelas pada majalah mode. Bisa membeli majalah internasional sungguh luar biasa - menurut saya majalah-majalah itu lebih menginspirasi dan layak dibeli. Anda bisa menghabiskan waktu lama untuk membaca-baca majalah, memutuskan mana yang akan dibeli, jadi datanglah dengan waktu luang!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Appreciate this, Emily. Glad you enjoyed exploring the international selection. It’s easy to lose track of time here 🙂
